caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text on it. The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, with framed photographs and memorabilia adorning the walls behind him. To his right, there is a clothing store display with mannequins dressed in various outfits, suggesting that the studio might be located within a retail space. The man seems engaged in conversation, smiling and speaking into the microphone, indicating an interactive and possibly lively discussion. The overall atmosphere is informal and relaxed, with a focus on dialogue and storytelling.
